The '''j'kuutak''' was a riding animal used as a mount on [[Guiteica/Legends|Guiteica]]. [[Guardian (rank)|Major-Guardian]] [[Aul Tarrus Vishav]] was skilled at riding a j'kuutak.<ref name="AIR" />
